headline.identifiability: aggregate moments identifiable under exact assumptions; individuals remain non-identifiable

method: TALON/TANGO with baselines and extended stress tests

observed: terminal client model deltas per round
observation_model.privacy_target: class counts, class sums, prototypes, dataset mean; not individuals

theorem_scope.exact: linear head, zero initial weights, full-batch local training, first-order terminal deltas, full-rank probe design

threat_model: active terminal probing via server-chosen classifier biases (not passive honest-but-curious)
